prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Pathfinder / Golarion inspired epic political fantasy world map for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast inner-sea fantasy world of many island groups and microcontinents, island nation-states, sprawling harbor cities, adventurer trade ports, ancient ruin islands, desert atolls, northern frozen islands, jungle interiors, volcanic sanctums, faction enclaves, lost vaults, wizard islands and sacred expedition sites.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated political fantasy atlas, aged ink-on-parchment, richly colored regional borders, hand-painted terrain relief, ornate compass and cartographic decorations, epic adventure society campaign tone.
Composition/framing: tall portrait world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; include large islands, tiny islets, crescent island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, fragmented cliffs and microcontinents with no grid-like spacing; include compass rose, sea routes, city icons, ruin markers and subtle political boundary shading without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in size and shape, with realistic complex coastlines, broken shores, curved bays, peninsulas, fjords, deltas, marshy estuaries, volcanic ridges and ancient landmarks; show many climates and biomes across the archipelago including snowfields, deserts, jungles, wetlands, temperate forests, mountains, volcanic badlands and magical corrupted zones.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, simple round islands, tropical-only palette, modern satellite image, board-game UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
